personal_info.name: Harnish Hacker
personal_info.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer & Cloud Architect
personal_info.summary: Innovative Full Stack Engineer with 16+ years of experience in architecting and implementing high-performance web applications. Expert in React, Node.js, and Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/Azure). Proven track record of leading cross-functional teams and delivering complex projects on time.

bullets: Architected and led the development of a microservices-based e-commerce platform handling 1M+ daily active users.
Implemented a real-time data processing pipeline using Kafka and Spark, reducing latency by 40%.
Mentored a team of 15+ engineers and established best practices for CI/CD and automated testing.
Optimized cloud infrastructure costs by 30% through strategic use of serverless and containerization.
Developed and maintained multiple enterprise-level web applications using React and Ruby on Rails.
Integrated third-party APIs for payment processing and CRM, improving business efficiency by 25%.
Led the migration of legacy monolithic applications to a modern React-based frontend.
Collaborated with UX designers to create intuitive and responsive user interfaces.
Built the core product from scratch using PHP and MySQL, scaling to 100k users in the first year.
Implemented automated deployment scripts using Bash and Jenkins.
Optimized database queries, resulting in a 50% improvement in page load times.
Contributed to open-source libraries used within the company.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

projects.title: AI-Powered Resume Builder
projects.description: A sophisticated web application that uses Gemini AI to optimize resumes for ATS compatibility.

projects.title: Cloud Monitoring Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time monitoring tool for multi-cloud environments with automated alerting.
